{{Infobox character
| name = Subject One
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = father of the Dreadgods, fifth or first Dreadgod, Father of Hunger, Slumbering Wraith, Dreadgod, first child of hunger
| abilities = hunger aura, hunger madra, borrowed authority, ability to eat a call for help
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

''See also: [[Subject One Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Subject One is a [[Dreadgod]] and the progenitor of their bloodline, often described as the original being from which all other [[Dreadgods]] were formed. Known as the fifth [[Dreadgod]] or the father of the [[Dreadgods]], this intelligent entity was once a man who became transformed by [[hunger aura]]. Subject One is closely associated with [[hunger madra]], serving as either its source or its primary host. Historically, Subject One ruled a [[labyrinth]] that served as its prison, an environment where it could use techniques to manifest anyone it had previously consumed. The entity's power and will were so deeply integrated into this location that the [[labyrinth]] itself functioned as an extension of its own authority. Although Subject One is considered dead—with its power having been distributed among the other [[Dreadgods]]—its influence remains through various remnants. These include its core binding, a unique and irreplaceable material that can be crafted into items like the [[Wraith Horn]], and its various techniques, such as a [[Striker technique]] known as the [[Slumbering Wraith]]. Even in death, Subject One's [[essence]] can be accessed through its arm or other fragments of its will.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Subject One]] is the father of the [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Subject One]] has weakened techniques.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Subject One]] is a [[Dreadgod]] who was once a man warped by [[hunger aura]] and is the origin of their bloodline.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Born from a birth pod within a tank, Subject One is a humanoid [[Dreadgod]] known as the [[Slumbering Wraith]] or the Father of Hunger. This six-armed entity, who possesses a gaping hole in his chest and has violated his oath, serves as the pulsing heart of the [[labyrinth]] and exerts control over its very nature. While waiting in a deep chamber at the center of the maze, Subject One's mummified left hand was removed and contained within a metal cube marked with a crescent moon. As [[Lindon]]'s group investigated the entity, Subject One's attacks intensified and his borrowed authority pulled at them, though he remained unable to reach their specific location. Following the removal of his arm, a [[hunger aura]] exceeded containment and Subject One's remaining will crashed into [[Lindon]] before the [[Dreadgod]] died within the [[labyrinth]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] is the first product of experiments that created the [[Dreadgods]] and is sometimes called the fifth or first [[Dreadgod]], the Father of Hunger, or the [[Slumbering Wraith]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] waits at the bottom of the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|A small metal cube marked with a crescent moon contains the hand of [[Subject One]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3">''Reaper'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]]'s attacks have intensified.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] is an entity sealed in the [[labyrinth]] associated with [[hunger madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9">''Reaper'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] and his group are investigating to find [[Subject One]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] wanted to keep a layer between them and the outside before revealing [[Subject One]]’s hand.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] is a mummified left hand of chalk-white flesh that acts as the pulsing heart of the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] possesses a borrowed authority that can pull [[Lindon]] toward doors.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] is controlling the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] is unable to reach the group's current location.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] waits in a deep chamber at the center of the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] has closed the way forward temporarily to fight the nature of the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18">''Reaper'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] possesses the hand of [[Subject One]] in a silver case.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] has a hand contained in a case.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] was born from a tank in the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]]'s thoughts came from below [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] has a birth pod.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] uses [[hunger madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] is an entity within the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] is the [[Slumbering Wraith]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] is a six-armed man.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] has a gaping hole in his chest where his heart should be.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] violated his oath.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] has control of himself again after death.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] is a [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] is the first child of hunger.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] is a prisoner in the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] does not remember his name.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] has a chamber with thin and gray light.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] has a throne.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] has an arm that [[Lindon]] can tear off.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The removal of [[Subject One]] causes the [[hunger aura]] to exceed containment.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] is a humanoid [[Dreadgod]] who held dominion over the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The power of the [[labyrinth]] is the power of [[Subject One]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]]'s remaining will crashed into [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] died in the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Once a prisoner within the [[labyrinth]], Subject One was a deceased entity possessing a core binding. While restricted to the lower half of the [[labyrinth]], this being implanted a dense knot of hunger into the walls and maintained the ability to consume calls for help. During an encounter in the [[labyrinth]], Subject One became associated with [[Lindon]]'s white hand. Eventually, [[Lindon]] unleashed this arm, which provided the strength necessary to crush the will of the [[Dreadgod]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Subject One]] implanted a dense knot of hunger in the [[labyrinth]] walls.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Subject One]] is associated with [[Lindon]]'s white hand.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Subject One]] was a prisoner in the [[labyrinth]] and is now dead.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Subject One]] has a core binding.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Subject One]] is restricted to the lower half of the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Subject One]] was encountered in the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11">''Dreadgod'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Subject One]] has an arm that helps [[Lindon]] crush the [[Dreadgod]]'s will.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] has unleashed the arm of [[Subject One]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Subject One]] has the ability to eat a call for help.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Subject One possessed a core binding composed of a unique and irreplaceable material. During an encounter, [[Lindon]] was forced to wrestle one of the entity's arms into submission. As the [[labyrinth]] progressed, pieces of Subject One's body were used as sustenance for the structure. Ultimately, the entity's [[binding]] was fashioned into a horn, and its death serves as a significant point of belief concerning the moment [[Dreadgods]] achieved intelligence.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The core binding of [[Subject One]] is a unique and irreplaceable material.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Subject One]] has an arm that [[Lindon]] must wrestle into submission.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[labyrinth]] is fed with pieces of [[Subject One]]'s body.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The death of [[Subject One]] is a point of belief regarding when [[Dreadgods]] gained intelligence.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24">''Waybound'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Subject One]]'s [[binding]] was worked into a horn.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] is traveling toward [[Subject One]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c2">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“Pardon, but I think you must be Subject One. My name is Lindon.”<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgods]]
